calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: NONE
Tentative ruling adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
